ops.title: S1 COMPLETE: steering v6 fully triaged (4134 rows, 3328 steering=80%) + audited + HF synced (traces 4134, sft 3328, dpo 348, kto 4134). Baseline: golden 57/57, precision .9583 (up from v5 .9375), contamination .102 (upper .203, up from v5 0), recall_hat .975. GOTCHA: a full opus triage (~1600 calls) exhausts one pool account; the mirror question_answer rows (2412, added last) were the unjudged tail so they all rate-limit-failed on the first pass — NOT a bug (fresh accounts judge them fine as 'direction'). Finished via a pool-account rotation loop. Next: S2 (refiner {action,complaint}->{action,direction}, export/dataset views under is_steering) + S3 (rename cc-pushback->cc-steering, manual DB migration).
